content.text: https://parrotmedia.in/ - i want to make a website for my own agency roller coaster media, make the same structure but take the colour and style branding from the attached image. make all the pages which are there on the given website as well. we offer the same services as them.

https://parrotmedia.in/ - i want to make a website for my own agency roller coaster media, make the same structure but take the colour and style branding from the attached image. make all the pages which are there on the given website as well. we offer the same services as them.

I'll help you build a website for Roller Coaster Media using the parrotmedia.in structure with your brand styling (black, white, magenta). Before I dive in, let me confirm a couple of choices that will shape the build.

questions.question: How should I build the site?

options.label: Plain HTML/CSS/JS multi-page (Recommended)
options.description: Separate .html files per page (home, about, services, etc.). Easiest to host anywhere — drop on any web host, GitHub Pages, Netlify. No build step.

options.label: Single-page React app
options.description: One .jsx file with client-side routing. Modern feel but heavier and needs a React setup to deploy.

options.label: Single long-scroll HTML page
options.description: All sections on one page with anchor navigation. Trendy for agencies but loses the multi-page structure of parrotmedia.in.

questions.question: What should I do for content (copy, agency details, contact info)?

options.label: Adapt Parrot Media's content to Roller Coaster Media (Recommended)
options.description: I'll rewrite their copy in your voice — same services and structure, but with your agency name and tagline ('From Zero to Ten').

options.label: Use placeholder Lorem Ipsum
options.description: Faster, but you'll need to fill in real copy later.

options.label: I'll provide content separately
options.description: I'll build the structure with clear [PLACEHOLDER] markers for you to fill in.

questions.question: How bold should the visual style be?

options.label: Match the poster — minimalist, mostly black with magenta accents (Recommended)
options.description: Bold huge typography, black backgrounds, magenta dot/highlight accents. Closer to the attached image.

options.label: Mirror Parrot Media's busier aesthetic, recolored
options.description: Their site has more imagery, gradients, and motion. I'll replicate that energy but in your color palette.

options.label: Hybrid
options.description: Bold minimal hero + more detailed/imagery-rich sections below.

## Digital Marketing   FAQs

As a leading digital marketing agency, we are dedicated to
 providing comprehensive educational resources and answering
 frequently asked questions to help our clients

[Schedule a Call](https://calendly.com/aseem-parrotmedia/parrot-media-account-audit?month=2025-12)

What makes Parrot Media different from other digital marketing
 agencies?

At Parrot Media, we offer 360° digital marketing solutions
 tailored to your business goals. From strategy to execution,
 we combine creativity, data-driven insights, and the latest
 tools to deliver measurable results.

Do you work with all types of businesses?

Yes! We work with startups, SMEs, and established enterprises
 across various industries. Whether you’re looking for brand
 awareness, lead generation, or e-commerce growth, our team
 customises strategies to suit your needs.

How long does it take to see results from digital marketing?

It depends on the service. Paid ads (Google Ads, Social Media
 Ads) can show results almost instantly, while SEO and organic
 strategies usually take 3–6 months for consistent growth.

Do you offer customised digital marketing packages?

Absolutely. We don’t believe in one-size-fits-all solutions.
 Our team analyses your business goals, budget, and audience
 before creating a tailored marketing plan.

Can you help if I already have an in-house marketing team?

Yes, we can collaborate with your in-house team to fill in
 skill gaps, provide strategy, or manage specific campaigns
 while ensuring smooth coordination.

## What Are Performance  Marketing Services?

Performance marketing services are digital marketing strategies where advertisers pay based on specific actions — clicks, leads, or sales. They encompass PPC advertising, social media ads, affiliate marketing, and conversion optimization.

- Keep track of every rupee spent

- Measure campaign success in real-time

- Fine-tune strategies for improved ROI
> In line with industry standards, performance marketing emphasizes ROI, audience targeting, and measurable growth — making it a powerful tool for today's businesses.

FAQs

Questions,
answered

Everything you might want to know about working with Roller Coaster Media — from process to pricing to performance.

Schedule a Call →
What makes Roller Coaster Media different?
We offer 360° digital marketing tailored to your business goals. From strategy to execution, we combine creativity, data, and the sharpest tools to deliver measurable results — not vanity metrics.
Do you work with all types of businesses?
Yes. Startups, SMEs, and established enterprises across D2C, SaaS, fashion, beauty, food, fintech, and beyond. Every engagement starts with a custom strategy for your stage and category.
How long until I see results?
Paid channels (Meta, Google) show traction within days. SEO and organic compounding usually need 3–6 months. We set expectations honestly during onboarding — and report on both in week one.
Do you offer custom packages?
Always. We don't believe in one-size-fits-all. Our team audits your business goals, budget, and audience before designing a plan you'd actually be excited to sign.
Can you collaborate with my in-house team?
Absolutely. We frequently fill skill gaps, lead strategy, or run specific channels alongside in-house marketing teams. Smooth handoffs, shared dashboards, no ego.

Ready to climb the curve?

Book a free 30-minute audit. We'll show you what's leaking and what's compounding — guaranteed actionable insights or your next call is free.

Schedule a Call →

What is performance marketing?

Performance marketing is digital marketing where you pay based on specific actions — clicks, leads, or sales. It includes PPC, social ads, affiliate, influencer, and conversion optimisation.

How can I contact Roller Coaster Media?
Email hello@rollercoastermedia.in, call us, or use the form on this page. Our team will reach out within two business hours.
What are your business hours?
Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM IST. Messages received outside these hours get a reply on the next working day.
Do you offer a free consultation?
Yes — every new conversation starts with a free 30-minute audit. We use it to understand your business and recommend the right approach. No commitment required.
How quickly will someone respond?
Within two business hours on weekdays. If you reach out over the weekend, expect a reply by Monday morning IST.
Can we meet your team in person?
In-person meetings can be arranged at our Mumbai office. Most discovery calls happen over Google Meet or Zoom — it's faster and lets us share screens.

files = ['index.html','services.html','blogs.html','contact.html']
for f in files:
    content = open(f).read()
    hrefs = re.findall(r'href=\"([^\"#][^\"]*)\"', content)
    internals = [h for h in hrefs if not h.startswith('http') and not h.startswith('tel:') and not h.startswith('mailto:') and not h.startswith('#')]
    for link in set(internals):
        target = link.split('#')[0]
        if target and not os.path.exists(target):
            print(f'{f}: BROKEN -> {link}')
print('All internal links checked.')
"

**What I built**

Four-page site mirroring parrotmedia.in's structure, recolored to your brand (pure black, white type, magenta dot accent — the dot shows up as the brand signature throughout):

- **index.html** — hero with massive "From Zero / To Ten." typography, trust marquee, stat strip, six core service cards, about split with animated metric bars, channel services, big numbers, a poster section that echoes your attached image exactly, client logo grid, FAQs, and CTA band.
- **services.html** — Performance marketing hero, core concept, six service cards (PPC, Social, CRO, Retargeting, Influencer, Full-Funnel) with bullet details, "why us" + "what you gain" split, four-step process.
- **blogs.html** — Hero with search, trending posts, newsletter signup band, full blog grid with date/badge cards.
- **contact.html** — "We Reply in 2 Hours" hero, full enquiry form (name/email/phone/brand/service/budget/message), contact cards, FAQs.

**Brand system in styles.css**
- Tokenized colors (`--rcm-black`, `--rcm-magenta` = `#d11e5f`), Inter font, magenta dot baked into every heading via `<span class="dot">`
- Reusable: nav, hero, cards, faq, form, blog cards, stat strip, marquee, CTA band, footer
- Responsive down to mobile with a slide-down nav

**To deploy**: drop all six files into any static host (GitHub Pages, Netlify, Vercel, cPanel) — no build step required. Replace the placeholder phone numbers / emails / social links and the `R` brand mark with your real logo when ready.

FAQs

Questions,
answered

Everything you might want to know about working with Roller Coaster Media — from process to pricing to performance.

Schedule a Call →
What makes Roller Coaster Media different?
We offer 360° digital marketing tailored to your business goals. From strategy to execution, we combine creativity, data, and the sharpest tools to deliver measurable results — not vanity metrics.
Do you work with all types of businesses?
Yes. Startups, SMEs, and established enterprises across D2C, SaaS, fashion, beauty, food, fintech, and beyond. Every engagement starts with a custom strategy for your stage and category.
How long until I see results?
Paid channels (Meta, Google) show traction within days. SEO and organic compounding usually need 3–6 months. We set expectations honestly during onboarding — and report on both in week one.
Do you offer custom packages?
Always. We don't believe in one-size-fits-all. Our team audits your business goals, budget, and audience before designing a plan you'd actually be excited to sign.
Can you collaborate with my in-house team?
Absolutely. We frequently fill skill gaps, lead strategy, or run specific channels alongside in-house marketing teams. Smooth handoffs, shared dashboards, no ego.

Ready to climb the curve?

Book a free 30-minute audit. We'll show you what's leaking and what's compounding — guaranteed actionable insights or your next call is free.

We offer 360° digital marketing tailored to your business goals. From strategy to execution, we combine creativity, data, and the sharpest tools to deliver measurable results — not vanity metrics.
Do you work with all types of businesses?
Yes. Startups, SMEs, and established enterprises across D2C, SaaS, fashion, beauty, food, fintech, and beyond. Every engagement starts with a custom strategy for your stage and category.
How long until I see results?
Paid channels (Meta, Google) show traction within days. SEO and organic compounding usually need 3–6 months. We set expectations honestly during onboarding — and report on both in week one.
Do you offer custom packages?
Always. We don't believe in one-size-fits-all. Our team audits your business goals, budget, and audience before designing a plan you'd actually be excited to sign.
Can you collaborate with my in-house team?
Absolutely. We frequently fill skill gaps, lead strategy, or run specific channels alongside in-house marketing teams. Smooth handoffs, shared dashboards, no ego.

Everything you might want to know about working with Roller Coaster Media — from process to pricing to performance.

Schedule a Call →
What makes Roller Coaster Media different?
We offer 360° digital marketing tailored to your business goals. From strategy to execution, we combine creativity, data, and the sharpest tools to deliver measurable results — not vanity metrics.
Do you work with all types of businesses?
Yes. Startups, SMEs, and established enterprises across D2C, SaaS, fashion, beauty, food, fintech, and beyond. Every engagement starts with a custom strategy for your stage and category.
How long until I see results?
Paid channels (Meta, Google) show traction within days. SEO and organic compounding usually need 3–6 months. We set expectations honestly during onboarding — and report on both in week one.
Do you offer custom packages?
Always. We don't believe in one-size-fits-all. Our team audits your business goals, budget, and audience before designing a plan you'd actually be excited to sign.
Can you collaborate with my in-house team?
Absolutely. We frequently fill skill gaps, lead strategy, or run specific channels alongside in-house marketing teams. Smooth handoffs, shared dashboards, no ego.

Schedule a Call →
What makes Roller Coaster Media different?
We offer 360° digital marketing tailored to your business goals. From strategy to execution, we combine creativity, data, and the sharpest tools to deliver measurable results — not vanity metrics.
Do you work with all types of businesses?
Yes. Startups, SMEs, and established enterprises across D2C, SaaS, fashion, beauty, food, fintech, and beyond. Every engagement starts with a custom strategy for your stage and category.
How long until I see results?
Paid channels (Meta, Google) show traction within days. SEO and organic compounding usually need 3–6 months. We set expectations honestly during onboarding — and report on both in week one.
Do you offer custom packages?
Always. We don't believe in one-size-fits-all. Our team audits your business goals, budget, and audience before designing a plan you'd actually be excited to sign.
Can you collaborate with my in-house team?
Absolutely. We frequently fill skill gaps, lead strategy, or run specific channels alongside in-house marketing teams. Smooth handoffs, shared dashboards, no ego.

FAQs

Questions,
answered

Everything you might want to know about working with Roller Coaster Media — from process to pricing to performance.

Schedule a Call →
What makes Roller Coaster Media different?
We offer 360° digital marketing tailored to your business goals. From strategy to execution, we combine creativity, data, and the sharpest tools to deliver measurable results — not vanity metrics.
Do you work with all types of businesses?
Yes. Startups, SMEs, and established enterprises across D2C, SaaS, fashion, beauty, food, fintech, and beyond. Every engagement starts with a custom strategy for your stage and category.
How long until I see results?
Paid channels (Meta, Google) show traction within days. SEO and organic compounding usually need 3–6 months. We set expectations honestly during onboarding — and report on both in week one.
Do you offer custom packages?
Always. We don't believe in one-size-fits-all. Our team audits your business goals, budget, and audience before designing a plan you'd actually be excited to sign.
Can you collaborate with my in-house team?
Absolutely. We frequently fill skill gaps, lead strategy, or run specific channels alongside in-house marketing teams. Smooth handoffs, shared dashboards, no ego.

Core Concept

What is performance marketing?

Performance marketing is digital marketing where you pay based on specific actions — clicks, leads, or sales. It includes PPC, social ads, affiliate, influencer, and conversion optimisation.

  • Track every rupee spent, transparently
  • Measure campaign performance in real time
  • Fine-tune strategies for compounding ROI

"In line with industry standards, performance marketing emphasises ROI, audience targeting, and measurable growth — making it the sharpest tool for modern businesses."

Quick answers to the questions we get most often. Still stuck? Just send a message — we genuinely read every one.

How can I contact Roller Coaster Media?
Email hello@rollercoastermedia.in, call us, or use the form on this page. Our team will reach out within two business hours.
What are your business hours?
Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM IST. Messages received outside these hours get a reply on the next working day.
Do you offer a free consultation?
Yes — every new conversation starts with a free 30-minute audit. We use it to understand your business and recommend the right approach. No commitment required.
How quickly will someone respond?
Within two business hours on weekdays. If you reach out over the weekend, expect a reply by Monday morning IST.
Can we meet your team in person?
In-person meetings can be arranged at our Mumbai office. Most discovery calls happen over Google Meet or Zoom — it's faster and lets us share screens.

What makes Roller Coaster Media different?

What are your business hours?
Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM IST. Messages received outside these hours get a reply on the next working day.
Do you offer a free consultation?
Yes — every new conversation starts with a free 30-minute audit. We use it to understand your business and recommend the right approach. No commitment required.
How quickly will someone respond?
Within two business hours on weekdays. If you reach out over the weekend, expect a reply by Monday morning IST.
Can we meet your team in person?
In-person meetings can be arranged at our Mumbai office. Most discovery calls happen over Google Meet or Zoom — it's faster and lets us share screens.

How can I contact Roller Coaster Media?

What are your business hours?
Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM IST. Messages received outside these hours get a reply on the next working day.

Can we meet your team in person?

FAQs

Questions,
answered

Everything you might want to know about working with Roller Coaster Media — from process to pricing to performance.

Schedule a Call →
What makes Roller Coaster Media different?
We offer 360° digital marketing tailored to your business goals. From strategy to execution, we combine creativity, data, and the sharpest tools to deliver measurable results — not vanity metrics.
Do you work with all types of businesses?
Yes. Startups, SMEs, and established enterprises across D2C, SaaS, fashion, beauty, food, fintech, and beyond. Every engagement starts with a custom strategy for your stage and category.
How long until I see results?
Paid channels (Meta, Google) show traction within days. SEO and organic compounding usually need 3–6 months. We set expectations honestly during onboarding — and report on both in week one.
Do you offer custom packages?
Always. We don't believe in one-size-fits-all. Our team audits your business goals, budget, and audience before designing a plan you'd actually be excited to sign.
Can you collaborate with my in-house team?
Absolutely. We frequently fill skill gaps, lead strategy, or run specific channels alongside in-house marketing teams. Smooth handoffs, shared dashboards, no ego.

30 minutes with a senior strategist. We'll audit your funnel, surface the biggest growth lever, and walk you through what an engagement with us would look like — no obligation, no sales fluff.

What is performance marketing?

Performance marketing is digital marketing where you pay based on specific actions — clicks, leads, or sales. It includes PPC, social ads, affiliate, influencer, and conversion optimisation.

  • Track every rupee spent, transparently
  • Measure campaign performance in real time
  • Fine-tune strategies for compounding ROI

Quick answers to the questions we get most often. Still stuck? Just send a message — we genuinely read every one.

How can I contact Roller Coaster Media?
Email grow@rollercoastermedia.com, call +91 98331 36580, or use the form on this page. Our team will reach out within two business hours.
What are your business hours?
Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM IST. Messages received outside these hours get a reply on the next working day.
Do you offer a free consultation?
Yes — every new conversation starts with a free 30-minute audit. We use it to understand your business and recommend the right approach. No commitment required.
How quickly will someone respond?
Within two business hours on weekdays. If you reach out over the weekend, expect a reply by Monday morning IST.
Can we meet your team in person?
In-person meetings can be arranged at our Mumbai office. Most discovery calls happen over Google Meet or Zoom — it's faster and lets us share screens.

FAQs

Questions,
answered

Everything you might want to know about working with Roller Coaster Media — from process to pricing to performance.

Schedule a Call →
What makes Roller Coaster Media different?
We offer 360° digital marketing tailored to your business goals. From strategy to execution, we combine creativity, data, and the sharpest tools to deliver measurable results — not vanity metrics.
Do you work with all types of businesses?
Yes. Startups, SMEs, and established enterprises across D2C, SaaS, fashion, beauty, food, fintech, and beyond. Every engagement starts with a custom strategy for your stage and category.
How long until I see results?
Paid channels (Meta, Google) show traction within days. SEO and organic compounding usually need 3–6 months. We set expectations honestly during onboarding — and report on both in week one.
Do you offer custom packages?
Always. We don't believe in one-size-fits-all. Our team audits your business goals, budget, and audience before designing a plan you'd actually be excited to sign.
Can you collaborate with my in-house team?
Absolutely. We frequently fill skill gaps, lead strategy, or run specific channels alongside in-house marketing teams. Smooth handoffs, shared dashboards, no ego.

What is performance marketing?

Performance marketing is digital marketing where you pay based on specific actions — clicks, leads, or sales. It includes PPC, social ads, affiliate, influencer, and conversion optimisation.

  • Track every rupee spent, transparently
  • Measure campaign performance in real time
  • Fine-tune strategies for compounding ROI

What are your business hours?
Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM IST. Messages received outside these hours get a reply on the next working day.
Do you offer a free consultation?
